/usr/bin/c++ -fPIC -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/polAlgorithms.dir/link.d -shared -Wl,-soname,libpolAlgorithms.so -o libpolAlgorithms.so CMakeFiles/polAlgorithms.dir/polygon/polAlgorithms.C.o  -Wl,-rpath,/run/media/abd-faiyaz/Files/tozoni-2016-implementation/build: libPolygonExt.so /usr/lib64/libgmpxx.so /lib64/libmpfr.so /lib64/libgmp.so
